features: OdourClear Technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent
Spray it all around the house to fight odours & freshen
Available in a wide range of fragrances
description: Product Description Indulge in the captivating allure of Febreze Enchanted Wildflowers, where a symphony of scents dances upon the air. This enchanting fragrance unveils a delicate tapestry of delicate white florals, weaving together the essence of luscious blackberries and succulent plums. As you inhale, your senses are transported to a secret garden adorned with velvety tuberose, intoxicating gardenia, and gentle violets.
